-- 4 of 7 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you about the three ad accounts
for prospecting. This is important because each
accomplishes a specific goal and can help your brand
distinguish itself from a Hero Product and a Multi-SKU
store.
Prospecting Structures
Cold Traffic Focused Account
New Launch Account
Scaling Account

Type of ad
Part of funnel
Structure Must Answer:
Can we navigate quickly?
Are there exclusions?
Are we testing audiences?
Are we testing creative?
